Inputs: Query q, knowledge base D, # iterations N, quality threshold τ Initialize query q1 ← q, initialize parameter s1 ← 0.8 for i = 1, . . . , N do
Compute sore: VSR = · VS(D) + (1 − ) · SS(q, D) Get the document set: D ← Vendi-Retriever(VSR; D) Generate reasoning: ← CoT(q, )
Generate answer ← LL(q, , 1:)
Evaluate quality: Qi ← LLM-Judge()
If Q ≥ τ then return
Else update q and : i+1 ← RewrieQuery(, , i) and +1 ← (Qi)
end
return âN
